YOUR CART

Phantom Wallet: Best Crypto Wallet Built for DeFi & NFTs

​Phantom Wallet is a decentralized Web 3.0 self-custodial wallet that keeps your private keys on your device, providing you with complete control of your funds. It is compatible with various browsers such as Chrome, Edge, Brave Browser, and Firefox. It is a type of software wallet which is all free to download. This forum makes the process of using the Solana blockchain easier. After downloading the wallet, you must input your password to start using it simply. You can easily observe your slippage rate and fee amount whenever you swap any token. You can also get an overview of all your current activities on your own Phantom Wallet. 
Top Features of Phantom WalletIt is easy to set up, access, and retrieve your Phantom Wallet. But before you head to those processes, you need to go through some of the top features/characters offered on this wallet.
  • Firstly,  the Phantom Wallet forum gives you access to SOL-based NFTs and many tokens.
  • Furthermore, you can conveniently stake Solana for passive income creation with your newly created wallet.
  • It follows very easy and simple steps to use  Phantom Wallet with Ledger devices and also for extra security. 
  • Known as a lightweight non-custodial trading platform, the  Phantom Wallet is a digital wallet for Ethereum and Solana which can be used in any browser. 

Steps to Use a Phantom Wallet To use Phantom Wallet, you need to remember some essential points. Go through the below-mentioned points to enhance your knowledge about the wallet. 
  • Link your Hardware Wallet: As the Phantom Wallet permits, you can link your hardware devices to your wallet. Presently, you are allowed to link only to Ledger devices. To start the process, you need to go to the Add/Connect Wallet and select the Connect Hardware Wallet option. To conclude the procedure, you can use the on-screen instructions. 
  • Deposit: to deposit SOL on your Phantom Wallet, you need to have the Deposit address. If you want to get a deposit address, find the needed token and select it. You will receive an application on your screen with the receiving address and     QR code that you might require for acquiring the asset. 
  • Send: This option permits you to transfer your tokens to other wallet users. You must add your recipient wallet address and the amount of the tokens you wish to send. Lastly, confirm the process. 
  • Swap: You can swap two offered tokens on your Phantom Wallet. You need to select the token that you want to trade the most, and lastly, input the token that you would like to get. 

Steps to Set Up a Phantom Wallet
To set up your Phantom Wallet, you need to go through some simple methods. It is necessary that you must note down the private keys correctly to avoid any issues. Then, you have to join your device with a good internet connection and use the methods listed below.
  • Foremost, you must head to the Phantom Wallet browser extension on your PC or laptop.
  • Then, find and press on the Create New Wallet bar.
  • Now, you have to create a new password for your wallet. 
  • You need to mention it again under the Confirm Password blank to confirm the password. 
  • Nextly, you have to select the Continue option provided on your screen.
  • Further, from the next page, you need to find the Seed Phrase for your wallet, note it down, and store it in a safe and secure place. 
  • Stepping ahead by pressing the bar stating- Ok, I saved it somewhere.
  • Head to the next page and input the Seed Phrase information on that page to validate it.
  • In the end, conclude the procedure by tapping on the Finish Wallet Setup button.
  • Congratulations! You have successfully created an account on Phantom Wallet. 

Steps to Withdraw Stake on Phantom Wallet
If your staking account status is inactive, you can try to withdraw your SOL back into your wallet. 
  • Firstly, you need to open the Phantom Wallet on your preferred device.
  • Secondly, you have to go to your Solana Token balance in your wallet.
  • Then, tap on the Your Stake box.
  • Moving ahead, you have to select the validator or staking account you would like to withdraw. 
  • After which, you should choose the three-dotted Symbol attested at the top-right side of your screen.
  • And at last, you have to tap on the Withdraw SOL button. 
  • Finally! You have completed the withdrawal process on your Phantom Wallet. 


Steps to Inspect the Staking Rewards on Phantom Wallet
If you want to observe or see all your staking rewards on your Phantom Wallet, then you need to walk through the instructions written here.
  • To begin with, move to your Phantom Wallet.
  • Nextly, you should paste your Wallet Address into the search bar.
  • Now, go to the Stakes button.
  • Then, from the available list, you need to select an account.
  • Further, you have to tap on the Stake Rewards option provided on your screen.
  • The Epoch number on your screen shows the reward date and amount.
  • If you want to get all the details in a spreadsheet, you can go with the Download CSV. 

Steps to Recover your Phantom Wallet
In case you are going through any issues while signing into your Phantom Wallet, you can attend the step-by-step guide descriptive in this section. 
  • To proceed, head to the Phantom Wallet on your device.
  • Move forward by tapping on the Use Seed Phrase button.
  • Use the correct field to input the Seed Phrases.
  • Ensure that you always enter the seed phrases in the proper form. 
  • Nextly, select a new and strong password and confirm it by adding it in the next bar.
  • If needed, you have to pay attention to the Terms of Use of Phantom Wallet.
  • You must read all those terms carefully and hit the checkbox attached to your screen.
  • Lastly, search out and click the Import option.
  • Gratefully, your Phantom Wallet problem is solved, and now you will be able to get access to your wallet utilizing the seed phrase credentials. 

Conclusion The above-attested information is fair enough for you to get familiar with the Phantom Wallet. You can utilize this Crypto wallet as a plug-in or browser extension. Likewise, MetaMask, the working process of the Phantom is the same. To use this Crypto wallet, you need to generate your account and then start to send, swap, and stale Splana to your wallet. You can also get an option to purchase NFTs utilizing your Phantom Wallet.
